hero.eyebrow: Halal in Hamburg -> family friendly & mindful travel
hero.title: A refined guide to Hamburg for
hero.description: Discover Hamburg through halal-friendly food tours, heritage walks, and carefully researched city experiences in various languages, designed for families, couples, small groups, and thoughtful travellers.
hero.imageAlt: Warm editorial illustration of Hamburg for a Muslim-friendly walking tour brand

intro.title: A warmer way to discover
intro.description: Halal in Hamburg exists for Muslim travellers who want the richness of the city without navigating uncertainty around food, atmosphere, or prayer spaces. We believe Hamburg deserves a better introduction than nightlife-heavy itineraries or vague food recommendations.
intro.imageAlt: Editorial illustration representing guided walking tours through Hamburg

positioning: Our tours suit travellers who want to experience real Hamburg culture. Whether Muslim or not, and wherever you are from, we are happy to welcome you and shape an experience that feels personal, flexible, and grounded in the city we grew up in.

trustPoints.title: Authentic and personal
trustPoints.description: Our tours are designed to feel authentic and personal, with real local context, calm pacing, and an introduction to the Hamburg we know from everyday life rather than generic sightseeing scripts.

trustPoints.title: Transparent and thoughtful
trustPoints.description: We are honest about what we know, what we verify, and how we define halal-friendly recommendations. We stay in contact with local mosques and imams so we do not share uncertainty casually.

trustPoints.title: Local knowledge with practical value
trustPoints.description: Beyond the walk itself, we help guests find the parts of Hamburg that are truly worth their time, including food, mosques, parks, neighborhoods, and founder-curated PDFs for the rest of the trip.

valueSection.description: The experience is designed to feel respectful, polished, and trustworthy from the first click to the day of the tour.

points.title: Personalisation before you arrive
points.description: You can let us know your wishes before your visit and we will do our best to shape the experience around your pace, interests, and practical needs.

points.title: A city introduction beyond tourist traps
points.description: We want to show you beautiful sites, peaceful neighborhoods, worthwhile attractions, and hidden gems instead of beer tours or overpriced stop-and-rush tourism.

points.title: Helpful extras beyond the tour
points.description: We also provide free PDFs such as mosque and food guides so your holiday in Hamburg stays easier even after the tour ends.

testimonial.quote: We are Sofiane and Momar, two young Muslims who grew up in a city we love and care for. We want to show you the best parts of Hamburg with honesty, warmth, and real local perspective.
testimonial.title: A local welcome from Sofiane and Momar
